heading: Annual report
label: 11335 Annual report
text: The National Board shall transmit to the Congress an annual report covering each year in which it conducts activities with funds made available under this subchapter.
notes: Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of provisions of law requiring submittal to Congress of any annual, semiannual, or other regular periodic report listed in House Document No. 103–7 (in which a report required under this section is listed in the 4th item on page 169), see , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
